name: Feature request
about: Propose a new category, framework, language, or mode
labels: enhancement

## What

<!-- One sentence. "Add cat-XX: <name>" / "Support Rust actix-web routing" / etc. -->

## Why

<!-- The attack class this closes or the gap it fills.
     Cite real-world CVE / bug bounty / known finding where possible. -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- Rough sketch: which files change, what the sub-agent prompt adds, etc. -->

## Dogfood plan

<!-- For new categories / frameworks / languages, we require
     test-run evidence before merge. Name a target repo. -->

## Would displace / supersede

<!-- If this replaces or conflicts with existing behavior,
     say so explicitly. Link the spec section. -->
